nodes.label: Batch embedding pipeline for all legal documents.  Reads statutes, judgments, an
Yield batches of documents that don't have embeddings yet.
RAG quality evaluation script.  Runs a set of test questions (Bengali + English)
Tests for LLM router smart routing logic.
Shared test fixtures with mock providers.
All configuration via environment variables. No hardcoded values.
Full RAG pipeline: Query -> Embed -> Search -> Rerank -> Generate -> Cite
Smart LLM Router — routes queries to the cheapest adequate provider.
Hybrid search service — vector similarity + BM25 full-text search.
Abstract provider protocols for all AI components.
No-op reranker — passthrough for testing/budget mode.
Factory for creating embedding providers from configuration.
DeepSeek LLM provider — uses OpenAI-compatible API.
BGE-M3 embedding provider — local model via FlagEmbedding.
Embed router — generate embeddings for text.
Search router — hybrid vector + BM25 search endpoint.
Ask router — full RAG Q&A endpoint.
Legal Q&A prompt templates for the Dhara RAG pipeline.
Rationale: lz4 over snappy for Alpine Kafka

links.source_location: both implement same rerank interface but noop is passthrough
both use AsyncOpenAI client and same settings keys
both use same Ollama base URL and httpx client pattern
